problem_text_cn: 四相交流发电机（电动势$arepsilon_1、arepsilon_2、arepsilon_3、arepsilon_4$，峰值$arepsilon_0$，角频率ω，相位依次超前π/2），四相五线制星形连接。1. 若$arepsilon_1=arepsilon_0 cosωt$，求线电压u_AB、u_AC、u_AD的瞬时值及峰值（$arepsilon_1$有效值220V）；2. 改用复电动势$arepsilon_1=arepsilon_0 e^{jωt}$，x、y点断开，求复电流$ilde{I}_A$；3. 若$ilde{Z}_A=R$、$ilde{Z}_B=jR$（L=R/ω）、$ilde{Z}_C=-jR$（C=1/(ωR)），求$ilde{I}_A$。
problem_text_en: Four-phase AC generator（electromotive forces$arepsilon_1、arepsilon_2、arepsilon_3、arepsilon_4$，peak value$arepsilon_0$，angular frequency ω，phase leading by π/2 in turn），four-phase five-wire star connection。1. If$arepsilon_1=arepsilon_0 cosωt$，find the instantaneous values and peak values of line voltages u_AB、u_AC、u_AD（effective value of$arepsilon_1$ is 220V）；2. Switch to complex electromotive force$arepsilon_1=arepsilon_0 e^{jωt}$，x、y points are disconnected，find the complex current$ilde{I}_A$；3. If$ilde{Z}_A=R$、$ilde{Z}_B=jR$（L=R/ω）、$ilde{Z}_C=-jR$（C=1/(ωR)），find$ilde{I}_A$.
problem_solution_cn: （1）线电压计算：- 瞬时值：u_AB=√2$arepsilon_0$cos(ωt−π/4)，u_AC=2$arepsilon_0$cosωt，u_AD=√2$arepsilon_0$cos(ωt+π/4)；- 峰值：U_AB0=U_AD0=440V，U_AC0=2×√2×220≈622V。（2）复电流$ilde{I}_A$：- 基尔霍夫方程组：$ilde{I}_Ailde{Z}_A - ilde{I}_Bilde{Z}_B=arepsilon_1-arepsilon_2$，$ilde{I}_Ailde{Z}_A - ilde{I}_Cilde{Z}_C=arepsilon_1-arepsilon_3$，$ilde{I}_A+ilde{I}_B+ilde{I}_C=0$；- 解得$ilde{I}_A=[\sqrt{2}e^{-jπ/4}ilde{Z}_C + 2ilde{Z}_B]arepsilon_0 e^{jωt}/(ilde{Z}_Ailde{Z}_B+ilde{Z}_Bilde{Z}_C+ilde{Z}_Cilde{Z}_A)$。（3）具体负载下的$ilde{I}_A$：- 代入$ilde{Z}_A=R$、$ilde{Z}_B=jR$、$ilde{Z}_C=-jR$，化简得$ilde{I}_A=√2arepsilon_0 e^{j(ωt+3π/4)}/R$。
problem_solution_en: （1）Line voltage calculation：- Instantaneous values：u_AB=√2$arepsilon_0$cos(ωt−π/4)，u_AC=2$arepsilon_0$cosωt，u_AD=√2$arepsilon_0$cos(ωt+π/4)；- Peak values：U_AB0=U_AD0=440V，U_AC0=2×√2×220≈622V。（2）Complex current$ilde{I}_A$：- Kirchhoff's equations：$ilde{I}_Ailde{Z}_A - ilde{I}_Bilde{Z}_B=arepsilon_1-arepsilon_2$，$ilde{I}_Ailde{Z}_A - ilde{I}_Cilde{Z}_C=arepsilon_1-arepsilon_3$，$ilde{I}_A+ilde{I}_B+ilde{I}_C=0$；- Solving to get$ilde{I}_A=[\sqrt{2}e^{-jπ/4}ilde{Z}_C + 2ilde{Z}_B]arepsilon_0 e^{jωt}/(ilde{Z}_Ailde{Z}_B+ilde{Z}_Bilde{Z}_C+ilde{Z}_Cilde{Z}_A)$。（3）$ilde{I}_A$ under specific loads：- Substituting$ilde{Z}_A=R$、$ilde{Z}_B=jR$、$ilde{Z}_C=-jR$，simplifying to get$ilde{I}_A=√2arepsilon_0 e^{j(ωt+3π/4)}/R$。
problem_answer: 1. 线电压瞬时值$u_{AB}=\sqrt{2}arepsilon_0 cos(ωt- rac{π}{4}{)}$，$u_{AC}=2arepsilon_0 cosωt$，$u_{AD}=\sqrt{2}arepsilon_0 cos(ωt+ rac{π}{4}{)}$；峰值$U_{AB0}=U_{AD0}=440V$，$U_{AC0}≈622V$；2. 复电流$ilde{I}_A= rac{(\sqrt{2}{e}^{-j rac{π}{4}{}}ilde{Z}_C + 2ilde{Z}_B)arepsilon_0 e^{jωt}}{ilde{Z}_Ailde{Z}_B+ilde{Z}_Bilde{Z}_C+ilde{Z}_Cilde{Z}_A}$；3. 具体负载下$ilde{I}_A= rac{\sqrt{2}{a}repsilon_0}{R} e^{j(ωt+ rac{3π}{4}{)}}$
